chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6852 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.34054/2015. 3. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He further states that it may be just and proper for the finalization of assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid, no coercive action would be taken against the petitioner. Learned Assistant Attorney General has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
